name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint — EDR alerts
description: Imports Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (MDE) alerts (Defender API / Microsoft Graph security alerts export) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT), with the impacted device linked as an ASSET and the ATT&CK category/technique kept as the classification. Severity is normalized from Informational/Low/Medium/High. Idempotent by source+alert id. Complements the Defender XDR incident alignment already in XORCISM. Offline: pass `file` = an MDE alerts JSON, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Microsoft Defender for Endpoint alerts JSON export to parse
